Rudolf Wacker active/lived Austria, Germany.
Rudolf Wacker known expressionist landscape, still life portrait painting.
Rudolf Wacker (Bregenz 1893 1939 Bregenz) landscape, still life portrait painter, considered most important European artists years between world wars.
Expressionist* major representative Neue Sachlichkeit ("New Objectivity") movement Germany Austria.
1909, Wacker began studies attending College Commercial Drawing Bregenz, Austria, 1910, Bauer School Industrial Drawing Vienna.
From 1911 1914, Wacker Academy Weimar studying under Albin Egger-Lienz Walter Klemm.
